summaryForNext: Phase COMPLETE: 6/6 goals MET, 8/8 changes archived, workspace green (289 unit + 5 e2e + 1 doc, 0 failed). Separated security-review caught 3 CRITICAL + 6 HIGH fail-open defects pre-archive. Top tech debt: admin API is unauthenticated (loopback-only) + no UI RBAC. Recommended next phase: agent-identity-and-delegation (NHI / RFC 8693 token-exchange) — deferred here per D-A05 — and pull ADMIN AUTHN forward as its first change (gates exposing the new web UI beyond loopback). Also resolve Redis-L2-as-hard-dep for budgets.
